name: finish-sound

metadata.name: finish-sound
metadata.summary: A simple package that plays a sound when code finishes running

documentation:
# finish-sound

`finish-sound` is a simple, silly Python package that plays a sound when your code finishes executing.

## Installation

You can install the package via `pip`:
```
pip install finish-sound
```

functions.name: finish_sound.play_finish_sound
documentation: Plays a random finish sound from the package's resources.
